task_objective: Implement launch-gated backup conflict resolution, Ludusavi diagnostics logging, and Decky version display.
tests_added: Backend tests for process pause/resume, conflict metadata, conflict resolution, diagnostics logging, and Decky version reporting.
Main RPC tests for pause/resume and conflict resolution.
Frontend static tests for launch gate ordering, conflict modal copy, and Decky version row.
HTML diagram tests for the launch-gated backup conflict flow.
design_decisions: Use AppLifetimeNotification.nInstanceID as the game process PID and send SIGSTOP/SIGCONT recursively to the process tree.
Always resume paused PIDs in frontend finally blocks and backend unload cleanup.
Use Backup Save user-facing language instead of Cloud Save because Ludusavi backs up locally by default.
Keep upstream pyludusavi unmodified; diagnostics and conflict metadata are implemented in first-party adapter code.
results: ./run.sh uv run pytest passed with 197 tests.
./run.sh uv run ruff format . left files unchanged after formatting.
./run.sh uv run ty check py_modules/sdh_ludusavi/ passed.
pnpm run verify passed after approved network access for pnpm audit.
